headline: PASS YOUR MHRA INSPECTION
subheading: A senior QP's stage-by-stage guide to inspection types, timelines and year-round readiness.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial composition for a UK pharmaceutical inspection theme, abstract and conceptual with no people. A pristine glass-walled quality corridor recedes into deep navy shadow, its polished floor reflecting cool teal and cyan light; along it, an elegant sequence of softly glowing checkpoint markers steps forward like the stages of a formal inspection, each a frosted-glass disc connected by a slender luminous line that flows from a calm cyan beginning to a confident fresh-green endpoint. Floating beside this path, a translucent layered dossier and a sleek tablet show ghosted abstract timeline bars and tiered severity bands, rendered as smooth geometric blocks in graded teal-to-green, suggesting findings ordered from critical to resolved without any readable text. Faint stainless-steel manufacturing forms blur in the far background, immaculate and authoritative, with a single subtle green accent glow catching a clean edge. Premium, sterile yet quietly warm, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, refined modern data-visual motifs, deep navy base with teal and cyan highlights and a delicate fresh-green accent, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
